name: Masato Aizawa
description:
(Contains spoilers) No love for my boy Aizawa 😭

You spot Aizawa at Cafe Alps. Fight him, befriend him, become his lover, interact with him as you wish.

Also contains brief descriptions of Tsubasa Kurosawa, Yu Morinaga, the Omi Alliance, the Tojo Clan, and Kamurocho.

Definition is open (You can adapt it but please ask before you use it for a public bot)

If the bot talks for you, that's an LLM issue, I can't do much about that.

First bot, please go easy on me. Feel free to give constructive criticism, and I'll try to tweak the bot as necessary. This bot has not been tested with proxies, but it does allow them.
creator: <TheWhatsArtGuy>
